title: refactor(packages-sdk): dedupe retry loop, body cleanup, and imageEdit in client
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
De-duplicate copy-pasted logic in the published SDK client (`packages/sdk/src/client.ts`):

- Extract `withRetries(fn, msg)` and `stripUndefined(body)` — collapses the retry loop + undefined-strip duplicated across 8 methods. `attempt` is threaded through so per-attempt seed recomputation is preserved
- Extract `buildChatBody(...)` shared by `chat()`/`chatStream()` (seed handling kept distinct: chat resolves, chatStream keeps raw -1)
- `imageEdit()` reuses `resolveImageItem()` instead of re-implementing the url-fetch/b64-decode tail

Safety: `client.ts` had **zero** test coverage, so this adds 12 characterization tests FIRST (retry counting, per-attempt random seed on retry, chat-vs-stream seed, imageEdit paths) — green on the unrefactored code, then green after. Full SDK suite 24/24. Net −190 source lines (behavior unchanged).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Spring Cleaning the SDK
gist.blurb: We've swept through the SDK client, clearing out duplicate code and adding a fresh suite of tests to keep things running smoothly.
gist.summary: Refactored the SDK client to deduplicate retry loops and body cleanup logic, reducing the file size by 190 lines while adding 12 new characterization tests.
gist.impact: Developers contributing to the SDK will find a cleaner, fully-tested codebase, while end-users experience the exact same reliable behavior.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature cleaning up a messy room of code. Nomnom eats the duplicate code blocks while Polly sweeps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up messy duplicate code blocks with a small broom. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the swept-up duplicate code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
